branding.websiteDescription: Enterprise Citizen Incident and Asset Portal

departments.name: IT Support
departments.description: Default IT support department handling all technical and operational issues.

departments.name: IT & Technical Services
departments.description: Handles hardware deployments, software issues, access management, and infrastructure outages.

departments.name: Facilities & Operations
departments.description: Responsible for office management, desk allocation, hardware repairs, plumbing, HVAC, and cleaning.

departments.name: Customer Billings & Finance
departments.description: Processes invoices, billing queries, transaction issues, and refund requests.

departments.name: Corporate Safety & Security
departments.description: Manages physical security, building access badges, tailgating incidents, and security audits.

departments.name: General Administration
departments.description: Coordinates organizational policies, system configurations, and general administrative inquiries.

categories.name: IT Hardware
categories.description: Computers, laptops, keyboards, mice, and other physical peripherals.

categories.name: IT Software
categories.description: Software installs, licensing, operating systems, and access credentials.

categories.name: Facilities & Maintenance
categories.description: Office environment, desks, chairs, lighting, and workspace support.

categories.name: General Inquiry
categories.description: General questions or feedback unrelated to system incidents.

categories.name: Billing & Refunds
categories.description: Billing disputes, double charges, incorrect line items, or tax disputes on invoices.

escalationGroups.name: L1 Support Group
escalationGroups.description: First-line support agents handling triage, basic hardware diagnostics, and general software issues.

escalationGroups.name: L2 Support Group
escalationGroups.description: Second-line specialists resolving complex hardware configuration, network problems, and billing reviews.

escalationGroups.name: L3 Support Group
escalationGroups.description: Third-line engineering team handling critical server deployments, codebase bugs, security breaches, and vendor relations.

escalationGroups.name: General Administration Team
escalationGroups.description: General system configuration, workspace settings, and corporate policies.
